name: Spiders
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix peanut butter, sugar, and crumbs together until a ball forms.
2. Divide the mixture into two parts to form two balls; one slightly smaller than the other.
3. Roll each ball in coconut.
4. Place the smaller ball on top of the larger ball. The smaller ball will be the head, and the larger one will be the abdomen.
5. Add 8 pieces of licorice for legs and 8 raisins for eyes.
